description_long: This house features a whimsical, storybook design with a steeply pitched, red-tiled gable roof and a stone facade accented by dark wooden beams. The walls are constructed from irregularly shaped gray stones, giving it a rustic, fairytale appearance. The roof is adorned with overlapping, scalloped red tiles and a decorative finial topped with a pink orb at the peak. Windows are small, blue-framed, and asymmetrically placed, with one set into a dormer and another beneath the gable. The main entryway is arched, wooden, and slightly off-center, framed by a timber overhang and supported by angled beams. The overall structure is compact, with playful, exaggerated proportions and a charming, handcrafted aesthetic.
description: A whimsical, stone-and-wood house with a steep red-tiled gable roof, blue-framed windows, and a decorative pink finial. The entryway is arched and timber-framed, giving the house a fairytale, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Front gable view showing the arched wooden door, stone facade, and decorative timber framing with a pink finial at the roof peak.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main entryway under a timber overhang, the red-tiled roof, and a small blue-framed window.
description_view_2: Opposite gable view with a small blue window, visible stonework, and the steep roof with the pink finial.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the broad expanse of the red-tiled roof and two blue-framed windows set into the stone wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door under a timber-framed overhang, with angled support beams and no visible steps or porch.
